assertions.description: U2 is a PC817 optocoupler connecting the remote button input (J2) to the ESP32-C3 GPIO21 via the TRIGGER_REMOTE net. The input side has the LED (anode via R1 to J2 pin 1, cathode to GND) and the output side connects to the microcontroller GPIO. This is a textbook galvanic isolation circuit. The isolation_barriers section is empty, and the signal_analysis.isolation_barriers list contains no entries. The PC817 is classified as a generic 'ic' type rather than being recognized as an optocoupler.
